metrics.name: azure_cpu_percent_average
metrics.description: Percentage of CPU used by the database workload, relative to its limit.

metrics.name: azure_sql_instance_cpu_percent_average
metrics.description: Total CPU usage (user plus system) of the SQL instance, as a percentage.

metrics.name: azure_sql_instance_memory_percent_average
metrics.description: Memory usage of the SQL instance, as a percentage of its limit.

metrics.name: azure_workers_percent_average
metrics.description: Worker threads in use as a percentage of the limit.

metrics.name: azure_sessions_percent_average
metrics.description: Active sessions as a percentage of the limit.

metrics.name: azure_physical_data_read_percent_average
metrics.description: Data file IO usage as a percentage of the limit.

metrics.name: azure_log_write_percent_average
metrics.description: Transaction log write throughput as a percentage of the limit.

metrics.name: azure_storage_average
metrics.description: Data space used by the database.

metrics.name: azure_storage_percent_average
metrics.description: Data space used as a percentage of the maximum data size.

metrics.name: azure_allocated_data_storage_average
metrics.description: Data space allocated to the database (includes unused space).

metrics.name: azure_connection_failed_total
metrics.description: Number of failed connections caused by system errors.

metrics.name: azure_connection_failed_user_error_total
metrics.description: Number of failed connections caused by user errors.

metrics.name: azure_blocked_by_firewall_total
metrics.description: Number of connection attempts blocked by the firewall.

metrics.name: azure_xtp_storage_percent_average
metrics.description: In-Memory OLTP storage used as a percentage of the limit.

dashboards.title: Azure SQL Database Overview
dashboards.description: Overview of Azure SQL Database metrics
